title: Industrial Revolution
description: Mechanized production transforms industry, labor, and transportation.

title: Electric Power Station
description: Edison's Pearl Street Station helps launch the age of practical electric power.

title: First Powered Flight
description: The Wright brothers achieve the first sustained powered flight at Kitty Hawk.

title: Moon Landing
